$comment: Project-scope MCP servers for contributors using Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf. Separate from the user-facing `mcp.json` (Open Plugins manifest).

aikido.$comment: Security scanner for AI-generated code. Set AIKIDO_API_KEY in your shell; get a key at https://app.aikido.dev. Docs: https://help.aikido.dev/ai-and-dev-tools/aikido-mcp

apideck-local.$comment: The MCP server this repo ships. Handy for exercising your own changes from inside an agent session.
